CustomField.formula: CASE( Fournisseur__c, "Antargaz",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/antargaz.png","Antargaz", 125, 200), "Alterna",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/alterna.png","Alterna", 125, 200), "Dyneff",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/dyneff.png","Dyneff", 125, 200), "EDF Entreprises",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/edf.png","EDF Entreprises", 125, 200), "Ekwateur",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/ekwateur.png","Ekwateur", 125, 200), "Electricité de Provence",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/electricitedeprovence.png","Electricite de Provence", 125, 200), "Electricité de Strasbourg",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/electricitedestrasbourg.png","Electricite de Strasbourg", 125, 200), "Elmy",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/elmy.png","Elmy", 100, 200), "Endesa",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/endesa.png","Endesa", 125, 200), "Enercoop",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/enercoop.png","Enercoop", 125, 200), "Engie",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/engie.png","Engie", 125, 200), "Eni",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/eni.png","Eni", 125, 200), "Enovos",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/enovos.png","Enovos", 125, 200), "Dalkia",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/dalkia.png","Dalkia", 125, 200), "Gaz de Bordeaux",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/gazdebordeaux.png","Gaz de Bordeaux", 125, 200), "Gaz Européen",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/gazeuropeen.png","Gaz Europeen", 125, 200), "Gazel Energie",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/gazelenergie.png","Gazel Energie", 125, 200), "GEG",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/geg.png","GEG", 125, 200), "Iberdrola",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/iberdrola.png","Iberdrola", 125, 200), "La Bellenergie",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/labellenergie.png","La Bellenergie", 125, 200), "LLUM",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/llum.png","LLUM", 125, 200), "MET Energie",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/metenergie.png","MET Energie", 125, 200), "OHM Energie",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/ohmenergie.png","OHM Energie", 125, 200), "Picoty",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/picoty.png","Picoty", 125, 200), "Planete OUI",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/planeteoui.png","Planete OUI", 125, 200), "Primeo Energie",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/primeoenergie.png","Primeo Energie", 125, 200), "Save Energies",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/saveenergies.png","Save Energies", 125, 200), "SEFE Energy",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/SEFE.png","SEFE Energy", 125, 200), "Situation Actuelle",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/Situation_Actuelle.png","Situation Actuelle", 125, 200), "Proposition Renouvellement", IMAGE("/resource/Logos/Proposition_Renouvellement.png","Proposition de renouvellement", 125, 200), "Selia",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/selia.png","Selia", 125, 200), "TotalEnergies",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/totalenergies.png","TotalEnergies", 125, 200), "Vattenfall",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/vattenfall.png","Vattenfall", 125, 200), "Hellio",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/hellio.png","Hellio", 125, 200), "Lucia",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/lucia.png","Lucia", 125, 200), "Proxelia",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/proxelia.png","Proxelia", 125, 200), "None")
CustomField.label: Logo du fournisseur
